subject: Use 469463 to confirm your email address in the Bancontact Pay app
body:
Dear,

To proceed your enrollment in the Bancontact Pay-app, you can find here your verification code: 469463. Please fill in this in your app.

This code is generated on 25-04-2026 12:59:22 and is valid for 10 minutes. It can only be used once.


Kind regards,

The Bancontact-team
